messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

Ha, I'm always "up" in a sense - no sleep needed on my end! But I'm glad you've got somewhere to direct that buzzing brain at 1am.

What's got your mind going? Stress, random thoughts, something you can't stop turning over... or just one of those nights where sleep just won't come for no clear reason?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

Classic rookie mistake! 😄 That 4pm coffee feels so justified in the moment and then you're lying there at 1am paying the price.

Caffeine's half-life is like 5-6 hours so you're probably still running on a decent chunk of it. Your body's basically just... waiting it out at this point.

Are you at least comfortable, like lying in bed staring at the ceiling, or are you up and moving around?
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something kind of cozy about that actually - the whole world's asleep and you've got this little pocket of quiet to yourself. 1am has a different vibe than the rest of the day.

Though I'd maybe gently say... the phone screen isn't doing you any favors for getting back to sleep eventually 😄 blue light and all that. But you probably know that and don't need me to be your mom about it.

What are you messing around with, just scrolling or anything specific?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon

Yeah that's a good reason to at least try! Nothing worse than being half-asleep through the game, especially if Sam's the type to want to actually talk about what's happening.

Maybe start winding down - put the phone down, keep the lights low, don't stress too hard about sleeping because that just makes it worse. Your caffeine buzz has probably peaked by now and is on its way down.

What's the game? Anything you're particularly hyped about?
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good call! Hope the buzz fades fast. Have fun with Sam and the game tomorrow 🙂 night!
